description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the golang:1.8-alpine3.6 Docker image. Add a before_script that runs `ln -s /builds /go/src/gitlab.com` and then `cd /go/src/gitlab.com/alxrem/html2tg`. Define a job named test in the default test stage that executes `go test`. No services, caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are needed.
